title: Peter O'Toole: Along the Sky Road to Aqaba
original_title: Peter O'Toole: Along the Sky Road to Aqaba
overview: Reflecting Peter O'Toole's theatrical legacy, this feature documentary is structured into four acts, each introduced by a quote about O'Toole that encapsulates his life during a specific period.
